context.setting: Working on laptop with laptop on Right

episode_text:
day=1; meal=chicken nuggets, broccoli, and ketchup; setting=Working on laptop with laptop on Right; time_of_day=noon;
preferences: microwave_time=1 min; occlusion_relevance=minimize right occlusion; robot_speed=fast; skewering_axis=perpendicular to major axis; web_interface_confirmation=no; transfer_mode=inside mouth transfer; outside_mouth_distance=not applicable; convey_robot_ready_for_initiating_transfer=speech; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_feeding=autocontinue; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_drinking=autocontinue; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_wiping=autocontinue; convey_robot_ready_for_completing_transfer=speech; detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding=perception; detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking=perception; detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping=perception; retract_between_bites=no; bite_dipping_preference=do not dip; wait_before_autocontinue_seconds=10 sec

microwave_time.user_tendencies: IF quiet personal setting AND neutral affect AND foods without sauces or dips THEN 1 min BECAUSE the only observed meal used 1 min reheating and there is no evidence of context-dependent variation yet.

occlusion_relevance.user_tendencies: IF working on a laptop or tablet positioned on the right AND neutral affect AND any food condition THEN minimize right occlusion BECAUSE the user explicitly chose to protect visibility of the device on the right. No other context-dependent variation observed yet.

robot_speed.user_tendencies: IF working context AND neutral affect AND any food condition THEN fast BECAUSE the observed choice suggests a preference to reduce interruption and meal time while occupied. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

skewering_axis.user_tendencies: IF quiet personal setting AND neutral affect AND solid bite-sized foods THEN perpendicular to major axis BECAUSE the observed feeding choice favored acquisition reliability, and there is no evidence yet of switching to narrower bites.

web_interface_confirmation.user_tendencies: IF working context AND neutral affect AND any food condition THEN no BECAUSE the user chose to avoid extra confirmation steps, consistent with minimizing interaction burden. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

transfer_mode.user_tendencies: IF any dining context AND any affective state AND any food condition THEN inside mouth transfer BECAUSE the user cannot lean forward due to lack of trunk control, making outside-mouth transfer physically unsuitable.

outside_mouth_distance.user_tendencies: IF any dining context AND any affective state AND any food condition THEN not applicable BECAUSE the user's physical abilities support inside-mouth transfer rather than outside-mouth transfer.

convey_robot_ready_for_initiating_transf.user_tendencies: IF working context AND neutral affect AND any food condition THEN speech BECAUSE the user selected an explicit auditory cue while attending to a laptop. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfe.user_tendencies: IF working context AND neutral affect AND any food condition THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user chose low-effort automation. Button input is incompatible with severe upper-limb paralysis, and no evidence yet supports open-mouth readiness as the preferred method.

IF working context AND neutral affect AND any food condition THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user selected low-effort automated initiation for drinking as well. Button input is incompatible with severe upper-limb paralysis. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

IF working context AND neutral affect AND any food condition THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user selected low-effort automated initiation for mouth wiping. Button input is incompatible with severe upper-limb paralysis. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

convey_robot_ready_for_completing_transf.user_tendencies: IF working context AND neutral affect AND any food condition THEN speech BECAUSE the user selected an auditory completion cue. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding.user_tendencies: IF any dining context AND any affective state AND any food condition THEN perception BECAUSE the user selected reliable sensor-based completion detection, and button input is incompatible with severe upper-limb paralysis.

detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking.user_tendencies: IF any dining context AND any affective state AND any food condition THEN perception BECAUSE the user has good head control and selected perception-based completion for drinking; button input is incompatible with severe upper-limb paralysis.

detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping.user_tendencies: IF any dining context AND any affective state AND any food condition THEN perception BECAUSE the user has good head control and selected perception-based completion for mouth wiping; button input is incompatible with severe upper-limb paralysis.

retract_between_bites.user_tendencies: IF working context AND neutral affect AND any food condition THEN no BECAUSE the user accepted longer visual presence of the robot in exchange for faster, less interruptive meal flow. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

bite_dipping_preference.user_tendencies: IF foods include sauces or dips AND working context AND neutral affect THEN do not dip BECAUSE the observed meal included ketchup and the user chose to avoid dipping, consistent with reducing mess while occupied. No other context-dependent variation observed yet.

wait_before_autocontinue_seconds.user_tendencies: IF working context AND neutral affect AND any food condition THEN 10 sec BECAUSE the user selected the shortest wait, consistent with a strong preference for efficiency and rapid automation. No context-dependent variation observed yet.
